name: Grogan's Mill Scenic Loop
description: A gentle 2-mile loop along Panther Branch that passes the Northshore boardwalk, three pedestrian bridges, and the sculpture garden at Millbend. Great starter walk if you're new to the pathway system.
highlights: Wooden pedestrian bridge at the 0.5 mile mark
Sculpture garden at Millbend midway through the loop

name: Creekside Park Family Loop
description: Flat, stroller-friendly 1.4-mile loop through Creekside Park past the Rob Fleming amphitheater and the sports fields. Passes a playground and a splash pad in season.
highlights: Playground and splash pad along the route
Wide, flat pathway — good for strollers and new walkers
seasonality: All seasons; splash pad open in warmer months

name: Sterling Ridge Forest Walk
description: 3.2 miles winding through Sterling Ridge under mature pine and oak canopy. Quieter than the eastern villages — you'll often have the trail to yourself.
highlights: Dense pine and oak canopy the whole way

name: Town Center Waterway Stroll
description: 1.6 miles along The Woodlands Waterway with fountains, public art, and restaurants nearby. Great for an evening walk before dinner or a coffee stop.
highlights: Public art installations along the walk
Restaurants and cafes at Market Street
seasonality: Year-round; extra beautiful during holiday lights
